_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin deficiency predicts FAK inhibitor sensitivity: a synthetic lethal relationship.

_contextSnippet: mice dosed orally twice daily with VS-4718 at 25 mg/kg had significantly smaller tumors (p=0.006) than mice receiving vehicle control after 29 days
details: 25 mg/kg orally twice daily caused significantly smaller tumors (p=0.006) in MDA-MB-231 xenografts after 29 days
